# Ballast sentence pool — AUTO-GENERATED dump of make_ballast.build_pool()
# over tests/tests_core.py (statement sentences only; wh-/pronoun-/
# demonstrative-initial sentences, short fragments and duplicates dropped).
# One sentence per line. Per-case usage + source cases: the .manifest.json
# files next to this file.
# Pool size by generator era: 732 here (current, post-splitter-fix; the
# regenerated suites incl. Phase 3 gemini+deepseek ran on this pool);
# 733 at rev 88ca7b0 (the suites the collected gpt+claude b4-b16 cells ran
# on); 738 in the first b2-era generator (rev a862b73). Historical pools:
# git show <rev>:llmpipe/tests/ballast/<suite>.manifest.json (pool_stats).
# Regenerate (from llmpipe/): python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'tests/ballast'); import make_ballast as mb; [print(e['text']) for e in mb.build_pool(mb.load_tests('tests/tests_core.py'))[0]]"
